title: • Today's Intention: I will question one of my own long-held assumption
content:
• Today's Intention: I will question one of my own long-held assumptions about what "should" bring me peace or success.

    • Answer: Today I will not be a victim. Today I will not allow myself to break over small inconveniences that may come my way. Today I will not let the behaviors of others affect me in a way that feels personal. I will keep on breathing in that good energy.



    NIGHT
    • Night Reading: "And I, who wished to read the book of the world and the book of my own nature, did I not despise the letters and signs? I called the world of appearances deception, I called my eyes and my tongue accident and worthless phenomena."
    • Reflection: What was my biggest "aha" moment today? Did a long-held belief prove to be unhelpful?
    Day 5
    MORNING
    • Morning Reading: "Rumours, fragrant rumours were in the air; there was talk of a Buddha, a sage, a son of the Sakyas, who had overcome the sorrows of the world and had brought the wheel of rebirth to a standstill."
context: From document: A 30-Day Journey with Siddhartha: Aligning the Path with Daily Life — chunk 11 (chunk 11/29)
